---
title: "Interrogator"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

DAS interrogator unit used for data collection.

Aliases: `Int`

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `resource_id` | str | Stable identifier for this shareable inventory resource. |
| `name` | str | Human-readable resource name. |
| `manufacturer` | str | Manufacturer name of the interrogator. |
| `model` | str | Model number of the interrogator. |
| `serial_number` | str | Serial number of the interrogator. |
| `instrument_type` | str | General instrument category. |
| `lead_cable_length` | float | Lead cable length for the interrogator. |
| `take_in_cable_length` | float | Take-in cable length for closed-loop systems. |

## Contains

_None._

## Contained By

- [References](References.qmd)

## References

_None._

## Referenced By

- uses from [Acquisition](Acquisition.qmd)
